title: Why Construction, Farming, Workshops, Garages, Property Owners, Landscaping, Contractors, Emergency Housing & Govt Projects Need These High-Quality Industrial Equipment Solutions
excerpt: 🏭 Chery Industrial — Ultimate Product Breakdown & Guide (2026) Comprehensive details with images, descriptions, and…
body:
🏭 Chery Industrial — Ultimate Product Breakdown & Guide (2026)

Comprehensive details with images, descriptions, and actionable info for buyers

🔧 1. Container Shelters

Chery Industrial’s Container Shelters are engineered to provide weather-resistant coverage for shipping containers, equipment, vehicles, and workstations. The shelters use heavy-gauge frames and fabric covers designed for rugged outdoor conditions. These are ideal for construction sites, logistics hubs, and industrial yards. (Chery Industrial)

Highlights:

  • Heavy-duty steel frame with weather-resistant fabric
  • Single or double truss options for strength
  • Multiple size options (20′, 40′, 40′ × 15′)
  • Fast on-site assembly and adjustable height options (Chery Industrial)

Sample products:
👉 20’×20′ Shipping Container Canopy Shelter — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/20×20-shipping-container-canopy
👉 40’×40′ Shipping Container Canopy Shelter — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/40×40-shipping-container-canopy
👉 40’×40’×15′ Double Truss Shelter — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/40×40-double-truss-container-shelter

🗄️ 2. Outdoor Storage & Shelters

This category includes canopies, storage buildings, and shelter systems built to protect vehicles, tools, woods, farm equipment, or inventory from the elements. Chery Industrial’s storage lineup features various widths and sizes, allowing buyers to match solutions to specific site needs. (Chery Industrial)

Key features:

  • Multiple size configurations
  • Weather-resistant structures designed for long-term outdoor use
  • Canopies and shelters with partially or fully enclosed panels
  • Expandable options for farm, industrial, or commercial use (Chery Industrial)

Sample products:
👉 Outdoor Storage Shelter — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/collections/outdoor-storage
👉 Heavy Duty Arch Shelter — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/heavy-duty-arch-storage-shelter

🛠️ 3. Heavy Duty Workbenches & Storage Cabinets

Among the most extensive categories, these products are built to organize tools and provide a stable workspace for professional workshops, garages, and service bays. Chery Industrial provides a wide range from compact 4.5ft workbenches to expansive 10ft workstations with dozens of drawers. (Chery Industrial)

Core advantages:

  • Fully welded **steel construction
  • Lockable drawers and cabinets with smooth sliding rails
  • Adjustable shelving and pegboard options
  • Mobile units with casters for easy relocation
  • Large range of sizes from 4.5ft up to 10ft and beyond (Chery Industrial)

Example units:
👉 7ft Heavy Duty Workbench with 20 Drawers — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/7ft-heavy-duty-workbench
👉 10ft Workbench with 25 Drawers — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/10ft-workbench-storage-cabinet
👉 10ft Storage Cabinet with 40 Drawers & Pegboard — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/10ft-storage-cabinet-with-40-drawers

🚻 4. Portable Restrooms & Sanitation Units

Chery Industrial’s portable restrooms range from basic units to deluxe models with sinks, showers, and handicap accessibility. These solutions are used for construction sites, outdoor events, vineyards, weddings, and farms, where permanent sanitation is unavailable. (Chery Industrial)

Highlights:

  • Standard and luxury restroom options
  • Handicap accessible units
  • Sink stations and shower options
  • Designed for easy transport and setup (Chery Industrial)

Featured products:
👉 Portable Restroom w/ Sink — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/portable-restroom-with-sink
👉 Portable Restroom w/ Showers — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/portable-restroom-with-showers
👉 Handicap Accessible Restroom — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/handicap-accessible-portable-restroom

🏠 5. Modular Homes & Prefab Housing

This fast-growing category transforms shipping containers and prefab shells into functional living or utility spaces. Whether for on-site offices, guest cabins, worker accommodations, or tiny homes, these modular housing units are designed for rapid setup and high durability. (Chery Industrial)

Notable features:

  • Expandable interiors
  • Pre-installed bathrooms, kitchens, and sleeping areas
  • Multiple size formats (7′×20′ up to 19′×20′)
  • Sustainable and transportable designs (Chery Industrial)

Popular models:
👉 Expandable Prefab House 19′×20′ w/ Cabinets — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/prefab-expandable-house-19×20-with-cabinet
👉 Tiny Home Expandable 15′×20′ — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/tiny-home-expandable-15×20
👉 Prefab Pod House — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/prefab-pod-house

📦 6. Shipping Containers & Outdoor Storage Boxes

Chery Industrial carries heavy-duty shipping containers that are used for storage, tools, inventory, and mobile workshops. These containers are also ideal for repurposing into offices or prefab housing. (Chery Industrial)

Advantages:

  • Weather-resistant full steel containers
  • Multi-door access options
  • Stackable and transportable
  • Perfect for long-term equipment or parts storage (Chery Industrial)

Top picks:
👉 40ft High Cube Shipping Container — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/40ft-high-cube-shipping-container
👉 Multi-Door Storage Container — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/products/multi-door-storage-container

🔩 7. Automotive & Garage Tools

Chery Industrial also features automotive maintenance tools such as lifts, vehicle jacks, diagnostic benches, and service equipment. These accessories help streamline workshop tasks and maintenance jobs. (Chery Industrial)

Examples include:
👉 Automotive shop creepers — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/collections/automotive
👉 Tire and oil service carts — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/collections/automotive

🔧 8. Dock Ramps & Loading Equipment

Heavy steel dock ramps and loading accessories facilitate safe and efficient movement of forklifts, pallets, and equipment between ground level and trailers. These are critical in warehouses and loading docks. (Chery Industrial)

Featured items:
👉 Steel Dock Ramp (various sizes) — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/collections/dock-ramps

🧰 9. Industrial Tools & Accessories

Chery Industrial’s tools range from hand tools and power tools to site accessories, fasteners, and parts kits. These products support construction, assembly, and site maintenance tasks. (Chery Industrial)

Product Examples:
👉 Industrial tool sets — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/collections/industrial-tools
👉 Parts & accessories — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/collections/parts-accessories

🚜 10. Skid Steer Attachments

Offerings include buckets, forks, augers, and grapples made for skid steer loaders used in agriculture, construction, and excavation. These attachments increase the versatility of skid steer machines. (Chery Industrial)

👉 Skid steer accessories — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/collections/skid-steer-attachments

🌳 11. Outdoor & Recreational Products

This category includes picnic tables, outdoor benches, portable outdoor shelters, and space-saving benches suitable for parks, recreational areas, or outdoor dining zones. (Chery Industrial)

👉 Picnic tables & outdoor gear — https://www.CheryIndustrial.Store/collections/outdoor-recreation

📝 Brand Reputation Snapshot

Chery Industrial maintains a 4.0/5.0 average rating on Trustpilot based on ~135 reviews. Reviewers praise product durability and customer service, though some note occasional missing parts or unclear instructions, typical of large-scale industrial products. (Trustpilot)

⛏️ Final Advice Before You Buy

  • Ask for detailed assembly manuals and freight options (liftgate, curbside, dockside).
  • Confirm warranty scope for structural frames.
  • For modular homes, verify code compliance with local authorities before installation.
